summary: 2026-06-10 23:04:28 PDT — Re-reviewed only `git diff 10c7f01...HEAD` and `git log --oneline 10c7f01..HEAD` against `reviews/server-rate-store.md`. The approved fixes appear complete: `resolveUid`/`requirePresenter` now fail closed for missing client id and require matching `aud` plus finite, unexpired `exp`; `PUT /api/rates` now validates via `rateStore.validateConfig` and 400s malformed bodies. I found no remaining fail-open path or new diff-grounded issue in this fix delta. Tests were not run during this read-only review.
